requirement_topic.en: EMC — IEC 62920 and IEC 61000 Evidence for Jamaica Solar PV Inverters
requirement_topic.zh: EMC——牙买加太阳能光伏逆变器IEC 62920和IEC 61000证据
requirement_topic.zht: EMC——牙買加太陽能光伏逆變器IEC 62920和IEC 61000證據

summary.en: For solar PV inverters supplied into Jamaica, EMC evidence should be prepared around internationally recognised PV inverter EMC standards and any BSJ-adopted or project-specified requirements. Practical evidence normally includes IEC 62920 for photovoltaic power conversion equipment EMC and applicable IEC 61000-series reports, including harmonic-current and disturbance evidence relevant to the inverter rating and installation. Because Jamaica's electricity sector is regulated by OUR and grid connection is reviewed through JPS/project processes, EMC reports should be tied to the exact inverter model, firmware, power rating, and grid configuration supplied.
summary.zh: 供应至牙买加的太阳能光伏逆变器，EMC证据应围绕国际认可的光伏逆变器EMC标准以及任何BSJ采纳或项目指定要求准备。实际证据通常包括光伏功率变换设备EMC标准IEC 62920，以及适用于逆变器额定值和安装方式的IEC 61000系列报告，包括谐波电流和骚扰证据。由于牙买加电力部门由OUR监管，并网通过JPS/项目流程审查，EMC报告应对应所供应的准确逆变器型号、固件、功率等级和电网配置。
summary.zht: 供應至牙買加的太陽能光伏逆變器，EMC證據應圍繞國際認可的光伏逆變器EMC標準以及任何BSJ採納或項目指定要求準備。實際證據通常包括光伏功率轉換設備EMC標準IEC 62920，以及適用於逆變器額定值和安裝方式的IEC 61000系列報告，包括諧波電流和騷擾證據。由於牙買加電力部門由OUR監管，併網通過JPS/項目流程審查，EMC報告應對應所供應的準確逆變器型號、韌體、功率等級和電網配置。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment
IEC 61000 series — Electromagnetic compatibility test methods and limits, including harmonic-current limits where applicable
Bureau of Standards Jamaica (BSJ) standards adoption and conformity context
Office of Utilities Regulation (OUR) electricity-sector oversight

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter EMC evidence commonly comes from GB/T 37408-2021 and related domestic test reports from CNAS-accredited laboratories. Those reports may use IEC 61000-family methods, but the report scope, test configuration, declared voltage, and acceptance route are Chinese domestic evidence. They should not be treated as automatically equivalent to IEC 62920 or project-specified IEC 61000 evidence for Jamaica.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器EMC证据通常来自GB/T 37408-2021及CNAS认可实验室出具的相关国内测试报告。这些报告可能使用IEC 61000系列方法，但报告范围、测试配置、声明电压和接受路径属于中国国内证据，不应被视为自动等同于牙买加所需的IEC 62920或项目指定IEC 61000证据。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器EMC證據通常來自GB/T 37408-2021及CNAS認可實驗室出具的相關國內測試報告。這些報告可能使用IEC 61000系列方法，但報告範圍、測試配置、聲明電壓和接受路徑屬於中國國內證據，不應被視為自動等同於牙買加所需的IEC 62920或項目指定IEC 61000證據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: GB/T 37408-2021 EMC evidence is not an automatic substitute for Jamaica BSJ, JPS, or project-owner EMC documentation. Exporters should prepare IEC 62920 and applicable IEC 61000 reports for the exact model and rating supplied, check whether the report covers 110/220 V operation at 50 Hz, and obtain a project-specific acceptance position from the Jamaica engineer, importer, or utility interface reviewer before shipment.
gap.zh: 差距：GB/T 37408-2021 EMC证据不能自动替代牙买加BSJ、JPS或项目业主的EMC文件。出口商应为所供准确型号和额定值准备IEC 62920及适用IEC 61000报告，检查报告是否覆盖110/220 V、50 Hz运行，并在出货前从牙买加工程师、进口商或公用电网接口审查方取得项目特定接受意见。
gap.zht: 差距：GB/T 37408-2021 EMC證據不能自動替代牙買加BSJ、JPS或項目業主的EMC文件。出口商應為所供準確型號和額定值準備IEC 62920及適用IEC 61000報告，檢查報告是否覆蓋110/220 V、50 Hz運行，並在出貨前從牙買加工程師、進口商或公用電網介面審查方取得項目特定接受意見。

mandatory_status.target: EMC evidence should be treated as a project and conformity-review gate where BSJ, JPS, importer, or owner specifications require IEC EMC reports
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese GB/T EMC evidence may support China domestic voluntary certification but does not automatically establish Jamaica acceptance

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Prepare IEC 62920 and applicable IEC 61000 EMC reports for Jamaica rather than relying only on China GB/T 37408-2021 EMC evidence. Confirm that test configurations cover the supplied inverter rating and Jamaica's 110/220 V, 50 Hz operating conditions, and verify any BSJ or project-owner documentation requirement before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向牙买加应准备IEC 62920和适用IEC 61000 EMC报告，而不是仅依赖中国GB/T 37408-2021 EMC证据。请确认测试配置覆盖所供逆变器额定值及牙买加110/220 V、50 Hz运行条件，并在出货前核实任何BSJ或项目业主文件要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向牙買加應準備IEC 62920和適用IEC 61000 EMC報告，而不是僅依賴中國GB/T 37408-2021 EMC證據。請確認測試配置覆蓋所供逆變器額定值及牙買加110/220 V、50 Hz運行條件，並在出貨前核實任何BSJ或項目業主文件要求。
